product_basic_kyc.product_name: Tatsya Marble Cake Stand with Gold Accent Base - Premium Kitchen Dessert Display Stand
product_basic_kyc.target_audience: Urban Indian homemakers, baking enthusiasts, party hosts, and gift buyers aged 25-45
product_basic_kyc.primary_use_case: Displaying cakes, pastries, and desserts in a stylish manner for home or event use
secondary_use_cases: Decoration centerpiece for festivals and celebrations
product_basic_kyc.occasion_based_usage: Ideal for Indian festivals like Diwali, weddings, birthdays, and other celebratory events for elegant dessert presentation

indian_context_product_theme.cultural_relevance: In Indian households, presenting sweets and cakes beautifully during festivals and gatherings is important; this cake stand adds sophistication and tradition through its marble and gold finish.
indian_context_product_theme.how_indian_customer_uses_product: Used predominantly at home during family get-togethers, festivals, birthday parties, and social occasions; also by home bakers and small event planners.
indian_context_product_theme.lifestyle_theme: Modern Indian kitchen meets elegance; combines traditional marble finish aesthetics with contemporary gold accent, reflecting growing preference for premium homeware.
indian_context_product_theme.emotional_practical_value: Conveys pride in hosting and gifting; provides a durable, stylish solution that elevates everyday celebrations and special moments with family and friends.

amazon_listing_strategy.ideal_amazon_title: Tatsya Marble Cake Stand with Gold Accent Base - Premium Dessert & Pastry Display for Indian Festivals & Parties
bullet_points: Premium Quality Marble Surface: Smooth, durable and elegant for safe cake presentation without stains or odors.
Sturdy Gold Accent Base: Provides stable support with stylish metallic finish enhancing modern Indian kitchen decor.
Perfect Size for Indian Cakes: Spacious top plate accommodates traditional round cakes, sweets trays, and pastries.
Multi-functional Use: Ideal for festive occasions, birthdays, weddings, and daily use as a dessert or snack stand.
Easy to Clean & Maintain: Non-porous marble surface wipes clean easily, ensuring hygienic display for every use.
amazon_listing_strategy.short_product_description: Elevate your celebratory occasions with the Tatsya Marble Cake Stand featuring a luxurious gold base. Designed for durability and style, this premium cake stand is perfect for Indian homes and festivals, making dessert presentation elegant and effortless.
a_plus_content_section_ideas: Module showcasing high-resolution close-up of marble texture and gold base emphasizing premium materials
Lifestyle imagery of Indian family celebrations featuring the cake stand with traditional sweets and cakes
Size comparison chart with common Indian cake sizes and usage scenarios
Care & maintenance tips highlighting easy cleaning and durability
Brand story emphasizing Tatsya’s commitment to quality and Indian consumer preferences

durable cake stand for Indian sweets and cakes
gold base cake stand for festive occasions
stylish kitchen dessert display stand India

image_specific_keywords: cake stand isolated on white background

visual_improvements: Showcase gold metallic base prominently with reflective lighting
Use Indian festive setups (e.g., rangoli, diya lamps) in lifestyle images
Highlight marble texture detail with macro shots
Minimalistic yet warm backgrounds incorporating Indian color palettes
Include real cake and sweet presentations typical to Indian festivals
messaging_improvements: Emphasize premium, durable, and elegant design suited for Indian home celebrations
Highlight emotional value of gifting and hosting with pride
Clear hygiene and maintenance benefits tailored for Indian kitchens
Use culturally relevant occasion cues in copy
Present multi-functional use cases beyond cake display
lifestyle_positioning: Target urban Indian homemakers and young couples
Celebrate traditional Indian celebrations with modern aesthetics
Portray as a premium gifting option for weddings and housewarmings
Position as a must-have for stylish Indian kitchens
Incorporate festive and daily routine usage
trust_premium_perception: Use brand story that roots in quality and Indian customer preferences
Showcase customer testimonials focused on durability and aesthetics
Offer reassurance on ease of use and cleaning
Position as a long-lasting, elegant investment for home décor

requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.product_constraints: Maintain the exact round marble top with natural veining and the reflective gold metallic conical base without any color or shape alteration; branding not visible so no modification needed.
recommended_image_angles: Front angle showing full top and base
45-degree angle highlighting marble texture and base reflection
Top-down close-up to showcase marble surface
Side profile highlighting height and base design
Lifestyle angle with food items placed on top
recommended_real_life_environments: Dining table set for family celebration
Festive decor setting with diyas and flowers
requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.lighting_requirements: Use soft, professional diffuse lighting mimicking daylight or warm indoor lighting to enhance marble veins and gold base reflectivity; avoid harsh shadows; ensure realistic food and environment illumination.
requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.amazon_a_plus_look: Clean, minimalistic layout with ample white space; premium serif or sans-serif fonts; neutral and warm color palette with gold highlights to complement product; focus on clarity and elegance.

suitable_backgrounds: Bright white studio background for product clarity
Warm beige or off-white kitchen setting
Festive Indian home décor with subtle rangoli and floral accents
Wooden dining table enhancing marble contrast
Soft fabric texture backgrounds for lifestyle warmth
lifestyle_scenarios: Cake placed with marigold and diya décor during Diwali
Classic Indian birthday party with guests and sweets
Wedding dessert counter with intricate Indian sweets
Casual home tea-time snacks showcasing versatility
Celebratory family events with children cutting cake
image_generation_guidance.text_placement_areas: Preferably top or bottom margins with enough white space; avoid overlapping product; clear space around the cake stand for overlay text modules
what_must_be_avoided: Any color or shape modification to product
Non-Indian cultural elements or western-style party props
